title: aliella helichrysoides subsp. nitidum
intro: Aliella helichrysoides subsp. nitidum, also known as Helichrysum nitidum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to help in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and act as an antioxidant. Helichrysum nitidum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions and digestive problems.
